plan_phases.description: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,800/month to retirement savings + $750/month to investments

recommendations.title: Stretch your buffer to cover a longer thin period
recommendations.body: Your recent income has been declining. With about 6.8 months of coverage already, the action is preserving runway, not growing it.
recommendations.next_move: Trim discretionary by $110/month and direct it to liquid savings.

recommendations.action: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,800/month to retirement savings + $750/month to investments
recommendations.reason: Your personalised plan: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,800/month to retirement savings + $750/month to investments
At your age the target for your age is roughly $216,000; you're about 81% behind. Consistent contributions today compound into the next decade.

recommendations.action: Add disability insurance to your benefits
recommendations.reason: Disability is a top cause of unplanned income loss; check whether your employer offers it.

recommendations.action: Check in weekly on your spending
recommendations.reason: A weekly look at where your money went is the strongest predictor of momentum — a few minutes is enough.
